publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2019-12-10 00:08:33 +0000.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Letters, chiefly to Perrier from Muséum colleagues, former students, and the public, and other material by Perrier. Correspondents include Albert Arnaud, Georges Bohn, Marcellin Boule, Auguste Chauveau, Julien Noël Costantin, J.L. Dantan, Albert Gaudry, Nestor Gréhant, A.G. Malard, André Perrier, and Rémy Perrier.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Perrier Papers, #4713. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: French zoologist and director of the Muséum national d'histoire naturelle, Paris.

did.unittitle: Bohn, Georges, Theorie Biologique de la Vision
Margerie, Emmanuel Marie Pierre Martin Joaquin
Havre, Aquarium et Jardin Ornithologique d'Acclimation
Madrid, College de la Societe Francaise
